lustcraft.command.talkarea.info:
TalkArea is a system that makes only people in a radius around you can hear you talk
You can enable or disable it with /talkarea toggle <true/false>
You can set the distance with /talkarea distance <distance>
You can enable or disable the listen mode with /talkarea listen <true/false>Listen mode prevent you to hear people out of the talk area (need to also have talkArea enable)
